title: terebinthus heterophylla
intro: Terebinthus heterophylla, also known as the 'varied-leaved turpentine bush', is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its aromatic foliage and small white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Terebinthus heterophylla include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant's resin is often extracted and used in topical ointments, essential oils, and infusions to promote healing and relaxation.
